===Pokémon: Twilight Wings===
[[File:Rose Twilight Wings.png|thumb|250px|Rose in [[Pokémon: Twilight Wings]]]]
Rose debuted in ''[[TW01|Letter]]'', where he was first seen watching a [[Pokémon League]] tournament battle between {{an|Leon}} and [[Bea]]. Afterwards, he visited a hospital and signed some children's shirts. Rose was then about to leave when he was approached by {{gal|John}}, a fan of Leon's who wanted him to give Leon a letter. Since John reminded him of Leon, Rose agreed to fulfill his request. Later, he saw the letter contained a drawing of Leon and his {{TP|Leon|Charizard}}.

In ''[[TW02|Training]]'', Rose was informed by [[Oleana]] that Bea was going to be {{pkmn|training}} at the [[Wild Area]] for a while and thus be away from her [[Gym]] for the time being. He approved of Bea's decision and expressed his hope that she wouldn't push herself too hard.

In ''[[TW04|Early-Evening Waves]]'', Rose approached [[Nessa]] following her loss to [[Milo]] during the [[Galar League|Champions Cup]]. He suggests that her two roles of [[Gym Leader]] and a model limited reaching her top potential in either one of them, therefore being responsible for her losing streak.

In ''[[TW05|Assistant]]'', Rose's past with Oleana was explored, revealing how her research had won his admiration. In the present day, he called Oleana over to accompany him after an intense day of work.

In ''[[TW06|Moonlight]]'', Rose gave John's letter to Leon at [[Rose Tower]].

In ''[[TW07|Sky]]'', Rose was at [[Wyndon Stadium]], opening up the match between Leon and [[Raihan]].
